title: Confetti Stuff
description: Adds silly confetti related items and blocks 🎉
body:
# Confetti Lib ## Features ### Confetti Cannon ![Confetti Cannon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6yBwpkox/images/d25c48b33053cf5f7243c6e924fb2ad81149e5f1.png) Spawns confetti particles when powered with redstone ### Party Popper ![Party Popper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6yBwpkox/images/95c580635b2db53d17d350c674e43e2a3e1dcd5a.png)
Spawns confetti particles when used
Has recoil, so it can be used for movement ### Confetti Layer ![Confetti Layer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6yBwpkox/images/4df490affaf765f78b2070459102d1e75e055149.png) A decorative layer of confetti that can be placed on the floor ### Broom ![Broom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6yBwpkox/images/d4c72d71e9c5bdf78a8731bdab3d221421e86ff7.png)
An item to quickly remove confetti
Deals knockback to entites in the way
